description: Create and execute a Gretl script (hansl) to test Engel's Law using the 'food.gdt' dataset. Estimate a log-log OLS regression model of food expenditure (food_exp) on income (income) using log-transformed variables. Perform a hypothesis test for the restriction H₀: β₁ = 1 to test for unitary income elasticity. Save the complete output, including the regression table and restriction test results, to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/elasticity_test_results.txt.
